LanguageData.EzTrade_TradeNoLongerAvailable: {name} can no longer trade with this merchant.
LanguageData.PodTrade.Fulfilled: Fulfilled the trade request from {settlement} via transport pods.
LanguageData.PodTrade.RewardsDropped: Quest rewards have been delivered to your settlement via drop pods.
LanguageData.PodTrade.ConfirmDesc: Launch transport pods to fulfill the trade request ({requestThingCount}x {requestedThingLabel}) at {settlement}?
LanguageData.PodTrade.ConfirmDescLeftover: Launch transport pods to fulfill the trade request ({requestThingCount}x {requestedThingLabel}) at {settlement}?\n\nAny leftover items will be sent as a gift (+{score}).
